mapper.select: SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo, ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm, au.dong_no AS dongNo, au.dong_nm AS dongNm, ad.ho_no AS hoNo, ad.ho AS ho, au.dong_nm || '동 ' || ad.ho || '호' AS displayDongHo, aht.ho_ty_no AS hoTyNo, aht.exclusive_size AS exclusiveSize FROM hshld_head hh INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = hh.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = au.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN apt_ho_ty aht ON aht.ho_ty_no = ad.ho_ty_no AND aht.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE hh.user_no = #{userNo} AND ac.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY ad.ho_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo, ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm, au.dong_no AS dongNo, au.dong_nm AS dongNm, ad.ho_no AS hoNo, ad.ho AS ho, au.dong_nm || '동 ' || ad.ho || '호' AS displayDongHo, aht.ho_ty_no AS hoTyNo, aht.exclusive_size AS exclusiveSize FROM hshld_head hh INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = hh.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = au.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN apt_ho_ty aht ON aht.ho_ty_no = ad.ho_ty_no AND aht.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE hh.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY ac.apt_cmplex_no, ad.ho_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT ym.bill_ym AS billYm, NVL(my_bill.bill_tot_amt, 0) AS myBillAmt, NVL(avg_bill.similar_avg_amt, 0) AS similarAvgAmt FROM ( SELECT bill_ym FROM ( SELECT b.bill_ym FROM bill b WHERE b.ho_no = #{hoNo} ORDER BY b.bill_ym DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3 ) ym LEFT JOIN bill my_bill ON my_bill.ho_no = #{hoNo} AND my_bill.bill_ym = ym.bill_ym LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.bill_ym, ROUND(AVG(b.bill_tot_amt), 0) AS similar_avg_amt FROM bill b INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = b.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} GROUP BY b.bill_ym ) avg_bill ON avg_bill.bill_ym = ym.bill_ym ORDER BY ym.bill_ym

WITH meter_code AS ( SELECT 'ELC' AS meter_ty_cd, '전기' AS meter_ty_nm, 'kWh' AS unit_nm, 1 AS sort_no FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'WTR', '수도', '㎥', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'GAS', '가스', '㎥', 3 FROM dual ), latest_meter AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ad.ho_no, f.facility_ty_cd, NVL(m.curr_val, 0) - NVL(m.pre_val, 0) AS usage_val, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ad.ho_no, f.facility_ty_cd ORDER BY m.meter_dt DESC, m.meter_hstry_no DESC ) AS rn FROM meter_hstry m INNER JOIN facility f ON f.facility_no = m.facility_no INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = m.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND TO_CHAR(m.meter_dt, 'YYYYMM') = #{billYm} AND f.facility_ty_cd IN ('ELC', 'WTR', 'GAS') AND m.meter_rslt_cd IS NOT NULL ) WHERE rn = 1 ), avg_meter AS ( SELECT facility_ty_cd, ROUND(AVG(usage_val), 0) AS avg_usage_val FROM latest_meter GROUP BY facility_ty_cd ) SELECT mc.meter_ty_cd AS meterTyCd, mc.meter_ty_nm AS meterTyNm, mc.unit_nm AS unitNm, NVL(my_meter.usage_val, 0) AS myUsageVal, NVL(avg_meter.avg_usage_val, 0) AS avgUsageVal FROM meter_code mc LEFT JOIN latest_meter my_meter ON my_meter.facility_ty_cd = mc.meter_ty_cd AND my_meter.ho_no = #{hoNo} LEFT JOIN avg_meter ON avg_meter.facility_ty_cd = mc.meter_ty_cd ORDER BY mc.sort_no

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM AS facilityNm, COUNT(*) AS useCnt FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH INNER JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO INNER JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE FH.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND FH.RSVT_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND FH.RSVT_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'APLY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS appliedCnt,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'POCS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS processingCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd IN ('RCPT', 'END') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS doneCnt FROM cvpl WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND NVL(cvpl_stts_cd, 'APLY') != 'CNCL'
